costPerTicket.basis: Average of each DELIVERED ticket's total cost, summed across every role that held it (BL-312's non-double-counted totals). Includes rework: every bounce/re-hold's usage counts toward the ticket, not just its first pass. Excludes usage outside any recorded holding window ('unattributed') and tickets with no priced model available for any of their usage - those are counted separately (see excluded count), never as $0.
